scope: Battle Command frontline pressure cards expose a fighting-rotation command when a pressured segment has both defenders and reserves.
The command moves a stressed defender to the fallback line and assigns a reserve unit to cover the same frontline segment.
The decision survives into After Action as battle roles for the withdrawn unit and covering unit.
codeChanges: BattleUnit now has a battle-runtime frontlineRotationRole.
orders.ts adds applyFrontlineRotation for tired-defender/reserve-cover swaps.
Battle Command pressure cards show a rotation preview and a secondary 戦闘交代 button.
results.ts maps rotation roles into 任務 戦闘交代 and 任務 後衛援護 with commendations and XP bonuses.

verification.mobileQa: skipped; mobile is outside the current target
flow: Ran battle at 3x until frontline pressure cards showed enemy pressure and enabled 戦闘交代 buttons.
Observed five enabled 戦闘交代 buttons under pressure.
Clicked one 戦闘交代 button.
Observed battle log '戦闘交代: 衛戍予備歩兵大隊を後退線へ下げ、第3野戦砲兵中隊が森林左翼線を引き継ぐ。'
Observed '任務 戦闘交代 / 損耗旅団を後退線へ整理'.
Observed '任務 後衛援護 / 交代旅団を援護、即応予備を投入'.
Applied result, returned to Theater, and reset campaign.
